name: mint cilantro tofu
instructions: slice firm tofu flat and large. boil/press first. dredge in starch (potato or corn) and pan-cook with turmeric, chili powder, cumin, coriander. mash cilantro, mint, garlic, ginger, lime in a mortar and add at the end — do not cook the herbs in.
notes: works only with firm tofu, sliced flat and large, that's been boiled or pressed.
